activities.title: Receive Upload Bytes
activities.description: Read the multipart upload, persist bytes to incoming/<original-filename>, assign a session-scoped ref id.

activities.title: Detect Office Mime
activities.description: Classify the upload by mime + filename extension into one of: docx | doc | xls | ppt | xlsx | pptx | non-office.

activities.title: Compute Cache Key
activities.description: Compute sha256(bytes) and concatenate with original_filename to form the cache key.

activities.title: Resolve Cache Hit
activities.description: Check whether incoming/<stem>/manifest.json exists with matching source.sha256 + source.filename. If hit, mark for short-circuit; if miss with prior dir, mark for rename-then-regenerate.

arrows.label: validated upload + cache verdict (hit / fresh / regen)
